def f(x): b={'very low':-2,'low':-1,'medium':1,'high':2,'very high':3}.get(x.get('BMI'),0); a={'very low':0,'low':0,'medium':1,'high':2,'very high':3}.get(x.get('Age'),0); hp=x.get('HighBP')=='yes'; hc=x.get('HighChol')=='yes'; hd=x.get('HeartDiseaseorAttack')=='yes' or x.get('Stroke')=='yes'; dw=x.get('DiffWalk')=='yes'; gl=x.get('GenHlth') in ('high','very high'); ha=x.get('HvyAlcoholConsump')=='yes'; nh=x.get('AnyHealthcare')=='no'; nd=x.get('NoDocbcCost')=='yes'; pa=x.get('PhysActivity')=='no'; bmi=x.get('BMI'); age=x.get('Age');
    if bmi=='very high' and not hp and not hc and not (age=='very high' and x.get('GenHlth')=='very high'): return 1
    if bmi=='high' and not hp and not hc and age=='very low' and x.get('GenHlth')!='very low': return 1
    if bmi=='medium' and age in ('very low','medium') and not hp and not hc: return 1
    if bmi=='medium' and hp and age=='medium' and (ha or nh): return 0
    if bmi=='high' and age=='medium' and x.get('Stroke')=='yes' and nh: return 0
    s=b+a+2*hp+hc+3*hd+dw+gl+pa-ha-nh-nd
    return 1 if s>=4 else 0

    if bmi=='very high' and not hp and not hc and not (age=='very high' and x.get('GenHlth')=='very high'): return 1
    if bmi=='high' and not hp and not hc and age=='very low' and x.get('GenHlth')!='very low': return 1
    if bmi=='medium' and age in ('very low','medium') and not hp and not hc: return 1

    if bmi=='high' and age=='medium' and x.get('Stroke')=='yes' and nh: return 0

candidate_code:
def f(x):
    s=0
    if x.get('HighBP')=='yes': s+=2
    if x.get('HighChol')=='yes': s+=1
    if x.get('HeartDiseaseorAttack')=='yes': s+=2
    if x.get('Stroke')=='yes': s+=2
    if x.get('DiffWalk')=='yes': s+=1
    if x.get('PhysActivity')=='no': s+=1
    if x.get('GenHlth') in {'high','very high'}: s+=1
    if x.get('Age')=='medium': s+=1
    if x.get('Age') in {'high','very high'}: s+=2
    s += {'very low':-2,'low':-1,'medium':1,'high':2,'very high':3}.get(x.get('BMI'),0)
    return int(s>=4)

def f(x):
    s = 0
    if x.get('HeartDiseaseorAttack') == 'yes' or x.get('Stroke') == 'yes': s += 2
    if x.get('HighBP') == 'yes': s += 1
    if x.get('HighChol') == 'yes': s += 1
    if x.get('BMI') in {'high', 'very high'}: s += 2
    if x.get('Age') in {'high', 'very high'}: s += 1
    if x.get('GenHlth') in {'high', 'very high'}: s += 1
    if x.get('DiffWalk') == 'yes': s += 1
    if x.get('PhysActivity') == 'no': s += 1
    return int(s >= 4)

def f(x):
    s = 0
    if x.get('HeartDiseaseorAttack') == 'yes' or x.get('Stroke') == 'yes': s += 2
    if x.get('HighBP') == 'yes': s += 1
    if x.get('HighChol') == 'yes': s += 1
    if x.get('BMI') in {'high', 'very high'}: s += 2
    if x.get('Age') in {'high', 'very high'}: s += 1
    if x.get('GenHlth') in {'high', 'very high'}: s += 1

    return int(s >= 4)
